title: Xtra Spicy French Tofu Curry
description: A quick and spicy French-inspired curry featuring Chinese five spice powder and a mirepoix base, made Jain-friendly by using tofu and avoiding animal products. This dish is perfect for those who like a little heat in their meals.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Chinese five spice powder and curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tofu and cook until it is lightly browned on all sides.
Add the coconut milk, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the sauce has thickened.
Add the hot sauce and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the curry hot over rice or with naan bread.
